variables.label: Application
variables.input: smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields name | sort name asc

0.content:
# 📊 [CLIENT_NAME] [LOCATION] — Core Web Vitals & Digital Experience SLO Dashboard

**Application:** Selected via dashboard variable | **SLO Standard:** Google Core Web Vitals P75 | **Min Samples:** 30 per page

This dashboard measures **real guest experience** against Google's Core Web Vitals standards — the same benchmarks that impact **SEO rankings, conversion rates, and guest satisfaction**. Metrics are evaluated at the **75th percentile (P75)**: 75% of visitors experience performance at or better than the reported value.

| Metric | What Guests Experience | 🟢 Good | 🟡 Needs Work | 🔴 Poor | SLO Target |
|--------|----------------------|---------|---------------|---------|------------|
| **LCP** — Largest Contentful Paint | How fast the main content loads | ≤ 2.5s | ≤ 4.0s | > 4.0s | P75 ≤ 2.5s |
| **CLS** — Cumulative Layout Shift | How much the page layout shifts | ≤ 0.10 | ≤ 0.25 | > 0.25 | P75 ≤ 0.10 |
| **INP** — Interaction to Next Paint | How fast the page responds to taps/clicks | ≤ 200ms | ≤ 500ms | > 500ms | P75 ≤ 200ms |
| **FCP** — First Contentful Paint | How fast something first appears on screen | ≤ 1.8s | ≤ 3.0s | > 3.0s | P75 ≤ 1.8s |
| **TTFB** — Time to First Byte | How fast the server responds | ≤ 800ms | ≤ 1.8s | > 1.8s | P75 ≤ 800ms |

2.title: ⏱️ LCP — P75
2.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000)

7.title: ✅ CWV SLO Pass Rate
7.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize 
    lcp_p75 = percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000,
    cls_p75 = percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75),
    inp_p75 = percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000,
    samples = count(),
    by:{view.detected_name}
| filter samples >= 30
| summarize
    total_pages = count(),
    passing_pages = countIf(toDouble(lcp_p75) <= 2500.0 and toDouble(cls_p75) <= 0.1 and toDouble(inp_p75) <= 200.0)
| fieldsAdd compliance_pct = toDouble(passing_pages) / toDouble(total_pages) * 100

8.query: data record(a="Pages Failing SLOs — Prioritized by Guest Impact")

9.title: 🔴 High-Traffic Pages Failing Core Web Vitals SLOs
9.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize 
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    CLS_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    FCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    Samples = count(),
    by:{view.detected_name}
| filter Samples >= 30
| fieldsAdd 
    LCP_SLO = if(LCP_P75 <= 2500.0, "✅", else:"❌"),
    CLS_SLO = if(CLS_P75 <= 0.1, "✅", else:"❌"),
    INP_SLO = if(INP_P75 <= 200.0, "✅", else:"❌")
| filter LCP_P75 > 2500.0 or CLS_P75 > 0.1 or INP_P75 > 200.0
| sort Sessions desc
| limit 10
| fieldsRename Page = view.detected_name
| fields Page, Sessions, LCP_P75, LCP_SLO, CLS_P75, CLS_SLO, INP_P75, INP_SLO, FCP_P75, TTFB_P75

10.query: data record(a="30-Day Performance Trends — Is Experience Improving?")

11.title: 📈 LCP P75 — 30-Day Trend (SLO: ≤ 2,500ms)
11.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize p75 = percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000, by:{day = bin(start_time, 1d)}
| makeTimeseries p75 = avg(p75), time:{day}, interval:1d

16.query: data record(a="Mobile vs Desktop — Where Are Guests Struggling?")

17.title: 📱 Core Web Vitals P75 by Device Type
17.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize 
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    CLS_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    FCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    by:{device.type}
| fieldsAdd 
    LCP_SLO = if(LCP_P75 <= 2500.0, "✅ PASS", else:"❌ FAIL"),
    CLS_SLO = if(CLS_P75 <= 0.1, "✅ PASS", else:"❌ FAIL"),
    INP_SLO = if(INP_P75 <= 200.0, "✅ PASS", else:"❌ FAIL")
| fieldsRename Device = device.type
| sort Sessions desc
| fields Device, Sessions, LCP_P75, LCP_SLO, CLS_P75, CLS_SLO, INP_P75, INP_SLO, FCP_P75, TTFB_P75

18.title: 📈 LCP P75 by Device — 30-Day Trend (ms)
18.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize lcp_p75 = percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000, by:{day = bin(start_time, 1d), device.type}
| makeTimeseries lcp_p75 = avg(lcp_p75), time:{day}, by:{device.type}, interval:1d

19.query: data record(a="LCP — Largest Contentful Paint (SLO: P75 ≤ 2,500ms)")

20.title: ⏱️ LCP — Worst 5 & Best 5 Pages (ms)
20.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize 
    Samples = count(),
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    P10 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 10) / 1000000),
    P25 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 25) / 1000000),
    P50 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 50) / 1000000),
    P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    P90 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 90) / 1000000),
    P95 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 95) / 1000000),
    Avg = toDouble(avg(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint) / 1000000),
    by:{view.detected_name}
| filter Samples >= 30
| fieldsAdd SLO = if(toDouble(P75) <= 2500.0, "✅ PASS", else:"❌ FAIL")
| sort P75 desc
| limit 5
| fieldsAdd Rank = "🔴 WORST"
| append [
    fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
    | filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
    | summarize 
        Samples = count(),
        Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
        P10 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 10) / 1000000),
        P25 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 25) / 1000000),
        P50 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 50) / 1000000),
        P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
        P90 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 90) / 1000000),
        P95 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 95) / 1000000),
        Avg = toDouble(avg(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint) / 1000000),
        by:{view.detected_name}
    | filter Samples >= 30
    | fieldsAdd SLO = if(toDouble(P75) <= 2500.0, "✅ PASS", else:"❌ FAIL")
    | sort P75 asc
    | limit 5
    | fieldsAdd Rank = "🟢 BEST"
]
| fieldsRename Page = view.detected_name
| fields Rank, Page, Sessions, Samples, P10, P25, P50, P75, P90, P95, Avg, SLO

21.query: data record(a="CLS — Cumulative Layout Shift (SLO: P75 ≤ 0.1)")

22.title: 📐 CLS — Worst 5 & Best 5 Pages (score)

| append [

    | filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
    | filter isNotNull(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift)
    | summarize 
        Samples = count(),
        Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
        P10 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 10)),
        P25 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 25)),
        P50 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 50)),
        P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
        P90 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 90)),
        P95 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 95)),
        Avg = toDouble(avg(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift)),
        by:{view.detected_name}
    | filter Samples >= 30
    | fieldsAdd SLO = if(toDouble(P75) <= 0.1, "✅ PASS", else:"❌ FAIL")
    | sort P75 asc
    | limit 5
    | fieldsAdd Rank = "🟢 BEST"
]
| fieldsRename Page = view.detected_name
| fields Rank, Page, Sessions, Samples, P10, P25, P50, P75, P90, P95, Avg, SLO

    P95 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 95) / 1000000),

| sort P75 desc

    fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
    | filter isNotNull(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte)
    | summarize 
        Samples = count(),
        Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
        P10 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 10) / 1000000),
        P25 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 25) / 1000000),
        P50 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 50) / 1000000),
        P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
        P90 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 90) / 1000000),
        P95 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 95) / 1000000),
        Avg = toDouble(avg(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte) / 1000000),
        by:{view.detected_name}
    | filter Samples >= 30
    | fieldsAdd SLO = if(toDouble(P75) <= 800.0, "✅ PASS", else:"❌ FAIL")
    | sort P75 asc
    | limit 5
    | fieldsAdd Rank = "🟢 BEST"
]
| fieldsRename Page = view.detected_name
| fields Rank, Page, Sessions, Samples, P10, P25, P50, P75, P90, P95, Avg, SLO
